basic_details.job_title: KVK Ambala Driver Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Krishi Vigyan Kendra Ambala (KVK Ambala) Driver Notification 2026 has been released on the official website ambala.kvk2.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the KVK Ambala Driver Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years. Age relaxation to SC/ST/OBC as per ICAR rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Matriculation pass from a recognized board.
qualification.details: Matriculation pass from a recognized board. Possession of a valid and appropriate driving licence from the prescribed Government Authority (the candidate will have to pass the practical skill test to be taken by an appropriate committee of the Institute). Desirable: (i) One year trade certificate in the relevant field from ITI or (ii) Experience of driving car, jeep, tractor in a recognized Institution or (iii) Experience of motor mechanic work.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for KVK Ambala Driver Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: ambala.kvk2.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 25-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the KVK Ambala Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the KVK Ambala Driver recruitment is 25th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Driver post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Matriculation from a recognized board and possess a valid driving license. Desirable qualifications include ITI certificates or relevant driving experience.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Driver position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Driver post is 30 years. Age relaxation will be provided to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per ICAR rules.

faq.question: Q4. How will candidates be selected for the Driver role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Driver post will involve a Written Test followed by an Interview. Candidates need to perform well in both stages.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Driver post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will be appointed at Pay Level-3 (7th CPC), with a salary ranging from Rs. 5200-20200 and a Grade Pay of Rs. 2000.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the KVK Ambala Driver recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there is an application fee. General/OBC and PwBD candidates need to pay Rs. 500/-. SC/ST and Women candidates are exempted from the application fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the KVK Ambala Driver recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q8. How many vacancies are available for the Driver post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Driver in Krishi Vigyan Kendra Ambala.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Krishi Vigyan Kendra Ambala, which is ambala.kvk2.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational/experience certificates along with the application form.
